title: DenWY's Binoculars
description: Resource pack changing the texture of the telescope to binoculars
body:
This is a simple resource pack that **changes the texture of a telescope to binoculars**.
The binoculars are gray. The zoom interface is also changed.

## Images:
![First person view.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b2ce79f7cd8814fd85940fc1894e79cb5dccdc44.png)

![Side view](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/665d96e0e6ee60058ee2bbd0224a9f1e4227e67f.png)
